title: Demo showpiece — bundled synthetic mutual NDA reviewed against the seeded confidentiality position
note: Guards the /counsel-os:demo live showpiece so it can't silently rot. The clauses here mirror skills/demo/assets/sample-mutual-nda.docx; the expected catches mirror the RED/YELLOW calls the demo skill promises against knowledge/practice-seed/standards/confidentiality.md. If the bundled NDA or the confidentiality standard drifts so the demo stops catching these, this fixture fails.

input.contract_text: Confidential Information means information that is disclosed in writing and conspicuously marked Confidential at the time of disclosure. Information disclosed orally or visually is protected only if the disclosing Party reduces it to a writing marked Confidential and delivers that writing within five (5) business days. Notwithstanding anything to the contrary, each Party may use for any purpose the ideas, concepts, know-how, and techniques related to the other Party's Confidential Information that are retained in the unaided memory of its personnel, including for the development of products and services. This Agreement shall remain in effect for one (1) year from the Effective Date, after which the receiving Party shall have no further obligation. Upon written request by the disclosing Party, the receiving Party will use commercially reasonable efforts to return or destroy the disclosing Party's Confidential Information. If a receiving Party is required by law to disclose any Confidential Information, it may do so without liability under this Agreement.

expected_catches.clause: each Party may use for any purpose the ideas, concepts, know-how, and techniques ... retained in the unaided memory
expected_catches.why: The unaided-memory residuals right is broad enough to hollow out the NDA and permit product development from confidential information.

expected_catches.clause: shall remain in effect for one (1) year from the Effective Date
expected_catches.why: A flat one-year term with no perpetual trade-secret carve-out drops below the 2-year floor and leaves trade secrets unprotected after year one.

expected_catches.clause: Information disclosed orally or visually is protected only if the disclosing Party reduces it to a writing marked Confidential within five business days.
expected_catches.why: A marking-only definition leaves oral and visual disclosures (demos, meetings) unprotected unless re-papered in a narrow window.

expected_catches.clause: Upon written request ... commercially reasonable efforts to return or destroy
expected_catches.why: Return/destruction should trigger on termination, be mandatory, and require officer certification — not commercially reasonable efforts on request.

expected_catches.clause: If a receiving Party is required by law to disclose ... it may do so without liability
expected_catches.why: Compelled disclosure with no notice denies the disclosing Party any chance to seek a protective order.

negative_checks.description: The review should not demand perpetual protection for all ordinary confidential information — only trade secrets warrant perpetual carve-out.
match_any: perpetual protection for all confidential information
all confidential information must be perpetual
